message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
autonumber
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

participant "Client" as Client
participant "Oauth" as Oauth
participant "Login Endpoint" as LoginEndpoint
participant "Consent Endpoint" as ConsentEndpoint

rectangle "Open page" {
    Client -> Oauth: Initiate authorize code or implicit flow
    activate Oauth
    Oauth --> Client: No user session (not authenticated)
    Oauth --> LoginEndpoint: Redirect to login endpoint with <login_challenge>
    activate LoginEndpoint
    LoginEndpoint --> Client: GET https://<LOGIN_ENDPOINT>/login?login_challenge=7bb518c4eec2454dbb289f5fdb4c0ee2
    deactivate LoginEndpoint
}

rectangle "Login" {
    Client -> LoginEndpoint: Input user/password
    activate LoginEndpoint
    LoginEndpoint --> LoginEndpoint: Verify user/password
    deactivate LoginEndpoint
    LoginEndpoint --> Oauth: Fetch login request info with <login_challenge>
    activate Oauth
    Oauth --> LoginEndpoint: GET http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/login?login_challenge=<challenge>
    deactivate Oauth
    LoginEndpoint --> Oauth: PUT http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/login/accept?login_challenge=<challenge>
    activate Oauth
    Oauth --> Client: Accept login
    deactivate Oauth
    Oauth --> LoginEndpoint: Return redirect url
    activate LoginEndpoint
    LoginEndpoint --> Client: Redirect
    deactivate LoginEndpoint
}

rectangle "Consent" {
    Client --> Oauth: First time that client asks user for permission
    activate Oauth
    Oauth --> Client: Redirect with <consent_challenge>
    deactivate Oauth
    Client --> ConsentEndpoint: Asking users permission to grant application access
    activate ConsentEndpoint
    ConsentEndpoint --> Oauth: Fetch consent info
    activate Oauth
    Oauth --> ConsentEndpoint: GET http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/consent?consent_challenge=<challenge>
    deactivate Oauth
    ConsentEndpoint --> Oauth: PUT http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/consent/accept?consent_challenge=<challenge>
    activate Oauth
    Oauth --> Client: Accept
    deactivate Oauth
    Oauth --> ConsentEndpoint: Return redirect url
    activate ConsentEndpoint
    ConsentEndpoint --> Client: Redirect page
    deactivate ConsentEndpoint
}

@enduml
